Our Simpo Sign A-frame kit includes everything you need: Sign hardware and two 22” x 27” compatible signs. Below, you can select the whole kit, order replacement signs, or just purchase the hardware. With high-quality, full-bleed printing, our signs are ideal for all kinds of businesses and events. Order replacement signs and swap them out with seasonal greetings, limited-time offers or any message that needs to be changed quickly and easily. Design yours using our templates or upload your own custom artwork. Great For: Outdoor Restaurant Menus Business Grand Openings Church Service Times Advertising a Storefront Sale Order Complete Kit Order Replacement Signs Order Hardware Only Complete Kit Kit Includes 1 — Simpo Sign A-Frame Hardware 2 — 22" x 27" Full-Color Printed Signs Order Complete Kit More About Simpo Sign A-Frames Return to Top The A-Frame holds (2) 22" x 27" signs—digitally printed on a 4mm corrugated plastic material. The material has hollow flutes similar to cardboard, making it lightweight and waterproof. With two signs, you can maximize the exposure of your message. You can even customize each sign to say something different. Tell your guests, 'Welcome', on one side when they walk in, and 'Goodbye' on their way out of your store. Each Simpo Sign A-Frame is foldable, making it super simple to set out in the morning, and take in at the end of the day. Also, when folded, it takes up a fraction of the room of other signs. This makes it super simple to store when not in use. Why Choose Banners.com? Customer Service Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers. Quality Products Our products are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology. Live Order Tracking Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system. Frequently Asked Questions Return to Top Product Information What is an A-frame sign (sidewalk sign)? An A-frame sign—also called a sidewalk sign or sandwich board—is a foldable, freestanding sign used to advertise in high foot-traffic areas like parking lots, strip malls, and outdoor restaurants. Are these A-frames suitable for outdoor use? Yes. These A-frames are made from durable plastic that won’t rust or splinter, and the frame can be filled with sand or water for extra outdoor stability. Does the Simpo Sign A-frame come with one or two printed signs? It comes with two (2) full-color printed signs, sized 22" × 27" (one for each side). What colors is the Simpo Sign A-frame available in? The Simpo Sign A-frame is available in white only. Do you offer any other A-frame sizes or styles? Yes. In addition to the Simpo Sign A-frame (22" × 27"), you also offer the Signicade Deluxe A-frame (24" × 36"). Return to Top Why Choose Banners.com?
